query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL) as public_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE public_status = 0 AND deleted_at IS NULL) as pending_docs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL) as total_stories,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actors) as actors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timeline_events) as timeline_events,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public_records_requests) as prrs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as users;
